ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the social media platform */,
  "platform_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of the social media platform (e.g., social networking, professional networking) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the platform (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the rating was given */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating for the platform in that year */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who provided the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source from which the rating was collected (e.g., survey, app store, website) */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback provided with the rating (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which ratings are collected */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Brief description or note about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, platform admin) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the administrator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the analyst's account */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the analyst (e.g., data science, market research) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the analyst has */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewers" (
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer */,
  "viewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the viewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the viewer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the viewer's account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the viewer belongs to (e.g., marketing, finance) */,
  "last_view" TEXT /* Date and time of the last view of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quarterly, annual, special) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Status of the trend (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the correlation belongs to */,
  "correlation_name" TEXT /* Name of the correlation */,
  "correlation_description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation */,
  "correlation_status" TEXT /* Status of the correlation (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the correlation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
